name: AI Stock Analysis Report Generator
description: Uses Exa to search for recent stock news and technical analysis data, Claude AI generates a comprehensive report with sentiment analysis, technical indicators, bull/bear cases, and trading signals, then posts the report to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Automated stock analysis reports with technical & news sentiment using GPT-4o

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for searching stock news

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the report

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the stock analysis report

companyName.description: Full company name (auto-detected if not provided)

steps.name: Build Exa search queries for stock research
Build Claude prompt for stock analysis
Parse Claude AI output and strip fences
Build Slack Block Kit stock analysis report
